name: Chewiest Granola Bars
recipeInstructions: You may substitute 1-1/2 cups crisped rice for 1-1/2 cups of the oats. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Coat the inside of a glass 9x12 baking dish with light vegetable oil. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, corn syrup, vegetable margarine, peanut butter and vanilla extract, and stir well until it reaches the consistency of a paste. Stir in the remaining ingredients and work the mixture so that several large clumps adhere together. Using your fingers, press the mixture into the baking dish. Bake at 350 degrees for 15-20 minutes until the bars turn golden brown. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars.
